gist.headline: Watering the apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the amazing community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS directory.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, checking on the health of the community apps represented as a digital garden with charts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a digital garden where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. A small clipboard nearby shows pixelated charts and metrics. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
